title: viola nagasawae var. acutilabella
intro: Viola nagasawae var. acutilabella, also known as Japanese pimpernel, is a species of flowering plant in the viola genus that is native to Japan and Korea. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, sore throat, and digestive issues, and is also believed to have anti-aging and immune-boosting effects. In herbal preparations, Viola nagasawae var. acutilabella is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to promote overall health and well-being.
